data.title: Best’s Review Global Insurance Broker Survey Now Accepting Submissions
data.description:
Best’s Review Global Insurance Broker Survey Now Accepting Submissions

AM Best’s monthly magazine, Best’s Review, is now accepting submissions to its annual Top Global Insurance Brokers ranking, which will be published in the July 2025 issue. Insurance brokerages will be ranked according to their 2024 total revenue. Additional information about top lines of business and key business developments also will be included.

Companies of all sizes are encouraged to submit financial information. The Top 20 will be presented according to ranking.

The deadline for submissions is April 14, 2025. Brokers may submit information online.

Please contact Best's Review Editor Tom Davis at tom.davis@ambest.com, +1 (732) 395 8956 for further information or with any questions about the ranking.

AM Best is a global credit rating agency, news publisher and data analytics provider specializing in the insurance industry. Headquartered in the United States, the company does business in over 100 countries with regional offices in London, Amsterdam, Dubai, Hong Kong, Singapore and Mexico City. For more information, visit www.ambest.com.

Copyright © 2025 by A.M. Best Company, Inc. and/or its affiliates. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.

Tom Davis
Editor, Best’s Review
+1 732 395 8956
tom.davis@ambest.com

data.title: New Charter Technologies Appoints Christopher J. Luise as Chief Operating Officer
data.description:
New Charter Technologies Appoints Christopher J. Luise as Chief Operating Officer

New Charter Technologies Appoints Christopher J. Luise as Chief Operating Officer

PR Newswire

DENVER, Feb. 18, 2025

Luise to drive operational excellence, scalable growth, and enhanced client and employee experiences across the platform.

DENVER, Feb. 18, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- New Charter Technologies, a portfolio company of Palo Alto-based private equity firm Oval Partners, has announced the appointment of Christopher J. Luise as Chief Operating Officer (COO). Luise, formerly CEO of ADNET Technologies (a New Charter Technologies company), brings extensive leadership experience and a strong track record of driving growth and operational maturity.

Peter Melby, CEO of New Charter Technologies, shared his enthusiasm for the move: "Chris brings a unique mix of strategic vision and hands-on leadership. He understands what it takes to scale operations without losing the community engagement and personal touch that define New Charter. His ability to lead by earning deep trust will be invaluable as we continue to expand and refine our approach."

Luise co-founded ADNET Technologies in 1991 with Edward D. Laprade. Its goal has always been to be a partner of choice for local businesses and to provide strategic IT guidance. For the past three years, Luise has not only served as CEO of ADNET, but he has also been Group President of New Charter.

As the COO of New Charter, Luise will take on an expanded role and oversee operations for the entire national platform of MSPs and technology companies. Currently, New Charter has nearly 30 companies across North America in its network.

"I'm excited to step into this role and contribute to the ongoing success of New Charter Technologies," said Luise. "New Charter's model combines the power of a national platform with the agility of local expertise. It's an approach that truly sets us apart, and I'm looking forward to working alongside this incredible team to build on that momentum."

Luise's appointment marks a strategic move to further New Charter's focus on hypergrowth while ensuring operational efficiency. His leadership will support the company's mission of helping IT service providers scale and work cohesively to deliver high-value solutions to clients across industries.

This appointment is also part of New Charter Technologies' broader strategy to position itself as a long-term leader in the IT services market. By balancing rapid growth with operational maturity, the company aims to build a resilient and innovative technology services platform that benefits both partners and clients.

READ FULL RELEASE

MEDIA CONTACT
Allison Francis 
New Charter Technologies
390302@email4pr.com  
319.572.2145

View original content to download multimedia:https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/new-charter-technologies-appoints-christopher-j-luise-as-chief-operating-officer-302379057.html

data.title: SmartSKN Launches K-PRO, the First AI-Powered Platform Transforming Skincare Professionals into Personalized Skincare Providers
data.description:
SmartSKN Launches K-PRO, the First AI-Powered Platform Transforming Skincare Professionals into Personalized Skincare Providers

SmartSKN Launches K-PRO, the First AI-Powered Platform Transforming Skincare Professionals into Personalized Skincare Providers

PR Newswire

BOSTON, Feb. 17, 2025

BOSTON, Feb. 17, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- SmartSKN is transforming the professional skincare industry with the launch of SmartSKN PRO, the first AI-powered platform that empowers skincare professionals with dermoscopic-grade skin analysis and AI-driven product formulations. This groundbreaking system, powered by the Muilli AI Dermascope, seamlessly integrates with SmartSKN LAB. The autonomous AI-driven robotic labs that translate precise diagnostic data into lab-engineered, bioavailable skincare formulations in real time.

 SmartSKN: The future of skincare, powered by AI and science-backed formulations.

By leveraging AI-driven formulation, SmartSKN robotic smart labs continuously optimize skincare based on evolving scan data, ensuring each formula remains responsive to a client's changing skin profile. Through adaptive manufacturing technology, estheticians, dermatologists, and beauty professionals can deliver clinical-grade, science-backed formulations optimized for deep penetration, stability, and efficacy—without inventory risks or product upfront costs.

A Breakthrough in Professional Skincare

Traditional professional skincare brands rely on static product lines that require professionals to choose from a large array of pre-made options rather than tailoring formulations to individual skin concerns. White-label skincare, on the other hand, provides private-label branding but offers minimal customization, often using generic base formulas with only slight modifications. SmartSKN PRO is the first platform to bridge this gap by combining clinical-grade skin diagnostics with AI-powered, real-time personalized skincare formulations. With over 25,000 possible formulations at their fingertips, skincare professionals can create hyper-customized products instantly, ensuring every client receives a formula tailored to their unique skin needs. All formulations are delivered fresh, on demand, with no inventory or product upfront costs.

Dermoscopic-Grade AI Skin Analysis

The Muilli AI Dermascope offers 60X magnification, bioimpedance sensors, and AI-driven diagnostics to evaluate hydration, oil balance, pore size, redness, sensitivity, pigmentation, wrinkles, dryness, and blemishes, powered by 150,000+ global skin profiles.

AI-Powered Custom Formulations: 25,000 Adaptive Solutions for Long-Term Skin Health

Professionals can provide clients with hyper-personalized skincare, formulated in real-time based on their scan results. AI-powered precision not only matches ingredients to skin data but also recalibrates formulations over time, ensuring active compounds remain effective as skin conditions evolve. This creates AI-driven adaptive formulations that continuously adjust to changing skin conditions, promoting long-term skin resilience and health.

SmartSKN PRO puts over 25,000 clinically validated formulations at a professional's command—leveraging AI to instantly match precise ingredient blends to each client's skin profile, optimizing bioavailability and long-term skin adaptation.

Integration of Specialized Plant Metabolites & Next-Generation Cosmeceutical Science

SmartSKN PRO is at the forefront of next-generation cosmeceutical innovation, integrating Specialized Plant Metabolites (SPMs)—bioactive compounds recognized for their antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and skin-renewing properties. With key actives such as polyphenols, flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids sourced from plant-powered ingredients like green tea, licorice root, fig, olive, and Centella Asiatica, SmartSKN formulations deliver clinically validated skin benefits backed by advanced AI formulation technology.

Traditional plant-based skincare suffers from poor absorption and ingredient degradation. SmartSKN's Liposome Smart Delivery encapsulates actives at the molecular level, ensuring sustained penetration, protection from oxidation, and extended efficacy.

By combining real-time AI diagnostics, bioactive-rich formulations, and adaptive skincare recalibration, SmartSKN PRO continuously optimizes formulations based on evolving skin conditions. This science-backed, AI-powered approach bridges the gap between high-performance dermatological formulations and plant-powered innovation, setting a new standard for precision, personalization, and efficacy in professional skincare.

The SmartSKN K-PRO product line is backed by independent clinical trials conducted at Human Co., Ltd. Skin Clinical Trial Center in Seoul, South Korea, under the oversight of Dr. Wonkyu Hong, M.D., Ph.D. These trials validate the effectiveness of SmartSKN's clean, plant-powered Korean skincare formulations, which leverage cutting-edge AI-driven research and ingredient innovation.

Clinical Trial Results

Moisturizing: Hydration increased by 275.05% immediately after application and remained 117.56% higher after 72 hours.
100% of participants reported improved skin hydration.

Brightening: Skin luminance increased by 3.96% after a single application.
100% of participants reported visible improvement in skin tone.

Sebum Control: Sebum reduction of 28.47% was observed after one use.
100% of participants saw less shine and smoother skin after one use.

Pore Refinement: Pore size visibly reduced by 5% after one use.
100% of participants reported visibly refined pores after one use.

Lifting Complex: Skin sagging angle improved by 2.77° around the eyes, forehead volume reduced by 17.87%, and cheek volume reduced by 12.28% after two weeks.
100% of participants reported visible lifting effects.

Elastin Complex: Enhanced skin firmness and elasticity were reported after 2 weeks of use.
100% of participants reported noticeable improvements in skin firmness.

Sensitivity Calming: Skin redness decreased by 6.13% after a single use.
100% of participants reported immediate soothing effects and reduced irritation.

Acne Control: Non-inflammatory lesions decreased by 19.96%, inflammatory lesions reduced by 30.62%, and overall acne severity grade improved by 25.33% after four weeks.
100% of participants reported clearer skin and reduced breakouts.

Scalable Business Model

No inventory, No upfront product costs and No Waste. SmartSKN PRO partners earn up to 30% commission on every sale

"For the first time, skincare professionals can transcend traditional products to offer true personalization," said Val Neicu, CEO of SmartSKN. "SmartSKN PRO empowers professionals with clinical-grade skin analysis and AI-driven, freshly formulated skincare—delivering custom, sustainable, and results-driven solutions that are as unique as each client's skin."

The Future of Skincare Professionals Starts Here

    • AI-Powered Precision – Move beyond traditional skin assessments with dermoscopic-grade AI diagnostics, providing real-time, data-driven skin analysis.
    • Hyper-Personalized Formulations – Each formula is tailored to real-time skin data and engineered for maximum bioavailability, ensuring deep absorption and long-term efficacy.
    • Effortless Revenue Growth – Earn up to 30% commission per sale with no inventory management, no product upfront costs, and no risk.
    • Clinically Validated, AI-Driven Formulations – Developed with Korean ingredient innovation, SmartSKN PRO delivers science-backed, plant-powered skincare supported by independent clinical trials.
    • Sustainable, On-Demand Manufacturing – AI-powered precision compounding ensures freshly made-to-order formulations, minimizing waste and environmental impact.

About SmartSKN

SmartSKN is a leader in AI-driven skincare technology, pioneering the next generation of professional skincare with dermoscopic-grade diagnostics and real-time, lab-formulated skincare solutions. Through its exclusive U.S. partnership with Lillycover, a leading Korean AI beauty-tech company, SmartSKN integrates cutting-edge diagnostics with personalized formulations, providing clinically validated, high-performance solutions. By combining AI, machine learning, clinical research, and on-demand production, SmartSKN is redefining the future of hyper-personalized skincare.

Apply now at https://smartskn.com/products/k-pro/join  and take your professional skincare practice to the next level.

Applications are manually reviewed, spaces are limited, and approval is not guaranteed.

Muilli AI Dermascope can be purchased at  https://smartskn.com/products/muilli

For professional business inquiries, contact pro@smartskn.com.

For PR inquiries, contact pr@smartskn.com.

www.smartskn.com

View original content to download multimedia:https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/smartskn-launches-k-pro-the-first-ai-powered-platform-transforming-skincare-professionals-into-personalized-skincare-providers-302379052.html

SOURCE SmartSKN, LLC

data.title: Zip Named to Forbes Fintech 50 as Procurement Innovation Leader
data.description:
Zip Named to Forbes Fintech 50 as Procurement Innovation Leader

Company Recognized for Transforming Complex Enterprise Procurement; One of Just 18 New Companies Added to Prestigious List

Zip, the world’s leading intake and procurement orchestration platform, today announced its selection to the 2025 Forbes Fintech 50 list, which recognizes the most innovative financial technology companies transforming industries. One of just 18 newcomers to make this year’s list, Zip was highlighted for its rapid enterprise adoption and for raising one of the largest fintech fundraises of 2024 with its $190 million Series D round in October.

“Being named to the Fintech 50 validates that procurement orchestration has become essential for modern enterprises,” said Rujul Zaparde, Co-founder and CEO of Zip. “As organizations face increasingly complex purchasing processes and rising fraud risks, we’re proud to help the world’s most innovative companies streamline their operations while maintaining control.”

Zip’s platform is revolutionizing procurement by simplifying the purchasing process for global enterprises, improving visibility into spending, and streamlining workflows across departments. In 2024 alone, Zip processed over $107 billion in spend, helping customers like OpenAI, Snowflake, and Prudential achieve significant savings and efficiencies. With Zip, customers save an average of 25% of the time previously spent on manual purchasing tasks and reduce overall spend by 3.6%.

Throughout the year, Zip reached several pivotal milestones that underscored its leadership in procurement orchestration:

  • Global Expansion: Opened a new London office and grew the EMEA workforce by 400% to meet surging demand across the UK, Germany, and France.
  • Product Innovation: Launched Zip Premier, an enterprise-grade suite for multinational organizations, and introduced a comprehensive AI suite that streamlines purchasing, document extraction, and invoice processing.
  • Customer Success: Helped Snowflake save over $300 million, Discover Financial Services increase throughput by 67%, and Northwestern Mutual drive 18% cost savings while increasing spend under management by 20%.

This recognition from Forbes builds on a series of prestigious honors Zip has received, including Fast Company’s Next Big Things in Tech, Inc.’s Best in Business, and a leadership position in IDC MarketScape: Worldwide SaaS and Cloud-Enabled Spend Orchestration Vendor Assessment (doc #US51795424e, September 2024).

For more information about Zip and its procurement solutions, visit ziphq.com.

About Zip

Zip is the world’s leading procurement orchestration platform, empowering businesses to accelerate the procurement process, mitigate risk, and drive growth by offering a single front door to unify the teams, tasks, and tools involved in working with suppliers. With Zip, businesses can maximize employee adoption of purchasing policies and increase spend visibility and control. As the leading solution for optimizing business spend, Zip’s AI-powered platform is trusted by hundreds of leading enterprises worldwide, including AMD, Anthropic, Arm, Canva, Coinbase, Discover, Dollar Tree, HP, Instacart, Lyft, Northwestern Mutual, Pinterest, Prudential, Reddit, Sephora, Snowflake, Sprouts Farmers Market, and Toast to maximize the ROI of every dollar. To learn more, visit ziphq.com.

chrysta@theolsoncompany.co

data.title: OpenTug Prioritizes BargeOS Suite with AI-Driven Feature Upgrades for 2025
data.description:
OpenTug Prioritizes BargeOS Suite with AI-Driven Feature Upgrades for 2025

OpenTug Prioritizes BargeOS Suite with AI-Driven Feature Upgrades for 2025

PR Newswire

SEATTLE, Feb. 18, 2025

From Continued Expansion of BargeOS Capabilities to Enhanced Data Reporting,
Marine Logistics Platform Shifts from Marketplace Roots

SEATTLE, Feb. 18, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Today, OpenTug, a marine logistics platform dedicated to optimizing freight efficiency on inland and coastal waterways, announced a strategic shift in its business priorities from its original marketplace model to the continued expansion and advancement of BargeOS, a comprehensive cloud-based platform for barge and voyage management. This move reflects OpenTug's commitment to the industry's growing need for streamlined, AI-powered tools that optimize booking, quoting and tracking processes across inland and coastal waterways.

"This shift represents the future of marine logistics, where automation and AI are no longer optional— they're essential for staying competitive," said Jason Aristides, CEO and co-founder of OpenTug. "As our company evolves our transition from the OpenTug Marketplace to BargeOS reflects our commitment to meet the growing demand for smarter, more efficient systems."

Originally founded with a vision to connect stakeholders across the maritime industry through its OpenTug Marketplace, customer feedback revealed a need for more efficiency and automation in the scheduling, ordering, quoting and tracking processes. In response, OpenTug developed BargeOS, a comprehensive solution that integrates the entire logistics workflow, offering tools for booking (BargeOS Booking), quoting (BargeOS Quoting) and tracking (BargeOS Tracking), all enhanced by AI-powered features.

Looking ahead to 2025, OpenTug is focused on expanding BargeOS capabilities with more AI-driven features, enhanced data reporting, and broader integrations with third-party tools to further streamline marine logistics. A key addition to this evolution is BargeOS Autopilot, a powerful AI solution which intelligently reads carrier traffic from multiple sources to provide an always up-to-date digital representation of barge voyages. This enables shippers and operators to effortlessly keep operations aligned with the latest movement data, without changing how they operate today. As part of this transition, OpenTug will prioritize its advanced BargeOS platform and strategically phase out legacy solutions, including the OpenTug Marketplace.

To discover how OpenTug enhances visibility and connectivity for inland and coastal shipping, visit opentug.com. For more information on BargeOS and our comprehensive solutions, visit opentug.com/solutions. Stay Ahead with Smart Marine Solutions: See BargeOS in action and experience the power of AI-driven logistics—Schedule a Demo Today.

About OpenTug
OpenTug is a marine logistics platform dedicated to optimizing freight efficiency on inland and coastal waterways by streamlining booking, quoting and tracking. Founded in 2019, the company offers cloud-based solutions, including OpenTug BargeOS and LinerOS. These services offer a comprehensive suite for cargo and barge management, including rapid quote generation, seamless booking, and real-time tracking, enabling operators to efficiently handle more cargo and enhance service quality with exceptional agility. To learn more about how OpenTug delivers the visibility and connectivity needed to fully utilize inland and coastal shipping, visit opentug.com.

View original content to download multimedia:https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/opentug-prioritizes-bargeos-suite-with-ai-driven-feature-upgrades-for-2025-302377359.html

SOURCE OpenTug

data.title: Medtronic Down Over 7%, on Pace for Largest Percent Decrease Since March 2020 — Data Talk
data.description:
Medtronic Plc (MDT) is currently at $85.82, down $6.99 or 7.53% 




     --Would be lowest close since Jan. 15, 2025, when it closed at $85.40 



     --On pace for largest percent decrease since March 16, 2020, when it fell 12.82% 



     --Snaps a five day winning streak

     --Up 7.44% year-to-date

data.title: Behavox Intelligent Archive Achieves Record-Breaking 300% Growth in Q4 2024
data.description:
Behavox Intelligent Archive Achieves Record-Breaking 300% Growth in Q4 2024

Behavox, the AI insights company that transforms structured and unstructured corporate data into insights that safeguard and enhance businesses, announced an extraordinary 300% quarter-over-quarter growth in its Intelligent Archive solution for Q4 2024. This unprecedented success underscores the escalating demand for innovative, scalable, and customer-centric compliance archiving solutions as organizations worldwide continue to migrate from legacy providers.

This milestone follows the remarkable 100% growth recorded in Q3 2024, cementing Behavox Intelligent Archive as the fastest-growing archiving solution in the market. Since its launch in January 2024, the Intelligent Archive has rapidly gained adoption among financial institutions thanks to its unique combination of advanced AI capabilities, customer-focused data ownership policies, and regulatory expertise.

Key Features and Benefits

Behavox Intelligent Archive empowers organizations with:

  • Scalable and cost-effective compliance: Consolidating compliance tech stacks to reduce operational costs while meeting global regulatory standards such as SEC 17a-4, MiFID, FINRA, GDPR, and CCPA.
  • AI-powered search and analytics: Providing real-time insights and streamlined access to critical data across over 100 communication and structured data channels, including text, audio, video, and transaction data.
  • Integrated AI analytics environment:Enabling organizations to safely and securely leverage enterprise data for insight and revenue generation.
  • Customer-friendly pricing and data export options: Offering free and flexible data exports to eliminate costly extraction fees and ensure complete data control.
  • Integration with Behavox Quantum: A single solution to capture, supervise, and manage all your electronic and voice communications in one place, which is performant and secure at all scales.

Executive Commentary

“This incredible growth in Q4 reflects the industry's growing recognition of Behavox as the premier choice for modern compliance archiving,” said Dr. Michael McGrath, Head of Strategy at Behavox. “We are leading the industry in enabling financial institutions to achieve regulatory excellence while reducing costs and operational complexity.”

The Intelligent Archive is also transforming the procurement process through the Google Marketplace, enabling organizations to simplify onboarding while benefiting from more efficient purchasing and lower costs.

“Our Q4 success demonstrates the market’s hunger for Behavox’s solutions that are designed as an interconnected ecosystem, amplifying value as customers adopt multiple products,” stated Nabeel Ebrahim, Chief Revenue Officer at Behavox. “We are proud to deliver a solution that not only meets but exceeds customer expectations, whether in insight generation, cost reduction, operational efficiency, or business enhancements.”

Upcoming Events

Behavox is also hosting roundtable discussions in New York, Toronto, and London. Explore emerging trends in compliance and data management. For more information and registration details, visit our website at www.behavox.com.

Fahreen Kurji, Marketing@behavox.com

data.title: U.S. Home-Builder Sentiment Falls on Tariff Concerns
data.description:
By Ed Frankl 




  House builders have grown more cautious in February, as concerns over President Trump's proposed tariffs, alongside still-high housing costs, weigh on confidence, according to a survey published Tuesday by the National Association of Home Builders. Here are the report's main takeaways: 



  --The NAHB Housing Market Index, produced alongside Wells Fargo, declined to 42 in February from 47 in January, the lowest level in five months. The index is a gauge of builder confidence in the market for single-family housing. 



  --Economists surveyed by The Wall Street Journal had expected the index to dip only slightly, to 46. 



  --It means confidence remains below 50-mark that represents the threshold between perceptions the market is "good" and "poor." 



  --Policy uncertainty and cost factors are weighing on expectations at the start of 2025, NAHB Chairman Carl Harris said. "Uncertainty on the tariff front helped push builders' expectations for future sales volume down to the lowest level since December 2023," he noted. 



  --"With 32% of appliances and 30% of softwood lumber coming from international trade, uncertainty over the scale and scope of tariffs has builders further concerned about costs," said NAHB Chief Economist Robert Dietz. Responses collected prior to the Feb. 3 announcement by President Trump that the proposed tariffs on goods from Canada and Mexico would be paused yielded a lower reading on the Housing Market Index than those collected after the pause was announced, Dietz said. 



  --All three components of the index--sales expectations, sales conditions and traffic of prospective buyers--lost ground in February, NAHB said. 



  --The survey said 26% of builders cut home prices in February, less than the 30% of January. There may be a lower usage of incentives as a sales strategy as elevated interest rates reduce the pool of eligible home buyers, Harris said. 





  Write to Ed Frankl at edward.frankl@wsj.com 





  (END) Dow Jones Newswires



  February 18, 2025 10:14 ET (15:14 GMT)


Copyright (c) 2025 Dow Jones & Company, Inc.

data.title: Half a Billion Viral Views and Counting - McMiller Games Debuts Fish Fight! at Toy Fair New York!
data.description:
Half a Billion Viral Views and Counting - McMiller Games Debuts Fish Fight! at Toy Fair New York!

Half a Billion Viral Views and Counting - McMiller Games Debuts Fish Fight! at Toy Fair New York!

PR Newswire

LOS ANGELES, Feb. 18, 2025

LOS ANGELES, Feb. 18, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- The creators of It's Bananas!—the hit party game with half a billion viral views—are back, making waves with their wildest game yet. Launching at Toy Fair New York,  Fish Fight is the flopping and plopping party game for all ages. This fast-paced indoor/outdoor showdown takes inspiration from cornhole and pétanque, all with a splash of McMiller's signature brand of laugh-out-loud challenges.

Gameplay is simple: split into two teams and follow the instructions on each Action Card to win pieces of a wrestling belt. The first team to complete their belt is crowned Titans of the Tide, while the losers are left floundering.

True to McMiLLER's eco-friendly mission, Fish Fight is 100% plastic-free, with every component made from plants—including four large cotton fish, a wooden target ball, jute rope, and punchboard wrestling belts—making it one of the most sustainable games on the market.

Fish Fight is available for a sneak peak at New York Toy Fair (1st - 4th of March), Booth 6259, and will be on sale June 2025 via Amazon.com and available for pre-order on www.McMiller.fun/fishfight, $24.99.

The Story Behind Fish Fight

David McGranaghan, Co-Founder of McMiLLER:

"After It's Bananas! blew up, we knew our next game had to deliver the same level of original, physical, laugh-out-loud fun. Fish Fight takes classic outdoor games and gives them a comedy twist—because honestly, who doesn't want to see a loved one squat and plop a fish from between their thighs?"

Julian Miller, Co-Founder of McMiLLER:

"People want games that are easy to learn, hilarious to play, and even funnier to watch. Fish Fight was built for social media, just like It's Bananas!—it thrives on big reactions, big laughs, and even bigger competition."

About McMiller

McMiller is a queer-owned, fun-fueled game company founded by Julian Miller and David McGranaghan. Known for their wildly entertaining, social-media-friendly party games, McMiller has created hits like It's Bananas, Fire in the Hole, UpRoar, and The Cat Mitt Game.

Click here for more details about our booth at: https://tfny2025.mapyourshow.com/8_0/exhibitor/exhibitor-details.cfm?exhid=389886

SOURCE McMiller

data.title: BWG Strategy and OTR Global Rebrand as BWG Global
data.description:
BWG Strategy and OTR Global Rebrand as BWG Global

BWG Strategy and OTR Global Rebrand as BWG Global

PR Newswire

CRANFORD, N.J., Feb. 18, 2025

CRANFORD, N.J., Feb. 18, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- BWG Strategy ("BWG"), a leading primary research platform for institutional investors and corporations, announced today that it has changed its name to BWG Global, effective immediately. This rebranding marks a significant milestone for BWG following its 2023 acquisition of OTR Global.

 Jon Kurzner, CEO of BWG Global, said, "Today is an exciting milestone for our company as we take the next step forward. Our new name brings together familiar elements of the two established research brands into a single identity."

BWG Global offers a comprehensive suite of proprietary research products to investment professionals at leading hedge funds, mutual funds, long-only investment firms, family offices and corporations through a single delivery platform. On an annual basis, BWG Global creates more than 2,500 content pieces that enhance investment managers' research mosaic and decision-making. Built on more than 30 years of investment research experience, proven methodologies and deep domain expertise across various industry sectors and regions, BWG Global delivers unparalleled insights and value to its clients.

Jon Kurzner, CEO of BWG Global, said, "Today is an exciting milestone for our company as we take the next step forward. Our new name brings together familiar elements of the two established research brands into a single identity. It represents how we are known in the institutional investment community and among our extensive network of active industry contributors around the world, and of course it is the brand identity that powers our incredible team who work diligently to produce timely, high-quality research."

He added: "We are one company and one team that is well positioned to offer a variety of research products and services. Some of our products are already familiar to many of our clients and will remain governed by their existing methodologies and grounded in the long-standing relationships with distinct, recurring industry contributors and sources. We are also dedicated to developing new products enabling us to synthesize more research findings and conclusions and to deliver incremental research in new ways to our clients."

About BWG Global

BWG Global has set the industry standard as the premier provider of industry intelligence to more than 100,000 professionals across leading hedge funds, mutual funds, long-only investment firms, family offices and corporations. Supported by a robust compliance structure and anchored in proven research methodology, BWG Global identifies key market inflections and uncovers unique investable ideas. The firm offers products and services through a license subscription to its digital research library and live events, including Primary Intelligence Virtual Forums, Forum Synopses, Channel Intelligence Research Reports, Market Insight Survey Reports and Custom Research.

BWG Global pioneered an investigative, interview-based methodology providing channel research to the institutional investment community in the 1990s and then expanded its footprint internationally to conduct live, in-depth interviews in more than 20 countries in North and South America, Europe and Asia. In 2013, the company fundamentally changed how investment managers and corporations access real-time information through live forum events. BWG Global provides much-needed transparency by creating access to real-time information and data on sector, company and technology trends.

Visit www.bwgglobal.com for more information.

View original content to download multimedia:https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/bwg-strategy-and-otr-global-rebrand-as-bwg-global-302377553.html

SOURCE BWG Global
